channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Netflix en avril 2026 : Stranger Things revient dans ce nouveau catalogue ! Voici les films et séries à ne pas rater
item.description: Quand bien même c'est le printemps, le froid et les rhumes jouent les prolongations. Alors pour continuer à passer des soirées au chaud à la maison, voici ce que Netflix a concocté pour le mois d'avril.

item.title: The 4.5-star Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 'knock it out the park' — and now you can save £50 with this code
item.description: Upgrade your audio with this £50 discount on the Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, which brings them down to £169 when you use the limited-time code.

item.title: C’est officiel : la PS5, PS5 Pro et le Portal sont plus chers en France
item.description: Hélas, la rumeur se confirme : Sony augmente les prix des consoles PS5, PS5 Pro, PS5 Digital Edition et PlayStation Portal.

item.title: Après le trafic de puces IA vers la Chine, Nvidia est à nouveau sous pression
item.description: Depuis quelques jours, l'entreprise de puces électroniques est à nouveau sous pression : deux sénateurs américains (Jim Banks et Elizabeth Warren) demandent à grand bruit que Nvidia suspende ses ventes de puces d'IA de pointe destinées à la Chine et à des pays intermédiaires d'Asie du Sud-Est... après l'arrestation de trois personnes accusées d'être impliquées dans un trafic de semi-conducteurs....

item.title: 'Congress is way behind where it should be in understanding the nature of this revolution and its impacts': New bill from Bernie Sanders and AOC wants to try and pause US data center construction
item.description: Sanders and AOC are proposing to ban data center construction while the US gets to grips with AI regulation.

item.title: My favorite Dell laptop deal for business professionals and students is back under $500 right now
item.description: Dell 15 Laptop delivers solid everyday performance for studying and remote work and it's currently selling for under $500.

item.title: Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Lite : cette nouvelle trottinette abordable est déjà moins chère avec ce code promo
item.description: La Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 Lite est la déclinaison la plus accessible de la nouvelle gamme de trottinettes électriques de la marque. À peine sortie, elle est encore moins chère que d'habitude : Cdiscount la propose à 314,99 euros au lieu de 329,99 euros grâce à un code promo.

item.title: Ryan Coogler’s ‘X-Files’ Reboot Has Found Its Other Big Star
item.description: Plus, Amazon's 'God of War' show has found its Freya.

item.title: Porsche Cayenne Electric Review: A Phenomenally Capable SUV
item.description: Porsche’s latest electric SUV is its most capable yet, and its most powerful street car ever. But should you wait for the hybrid instead?

item.title: iOS 26.4 age verification is proving a disaster for some users — here's how to fix it or stop the update
item.description: Age verification for Apple accounts is now mandatory if you're in the UK and use an iPhone or iPad.

item.title: Battery life just dethroned price as the biggest driver of smartphone purchases — and AI doesn't come close
item.description: Battery life is the new biggest driver of smartphone purchases, and I'm honestly not surprised.

item.title: Currys kicks off its Easter sale early — I've found the 16 best offers on laptops, TVs, headphones, appliances, and more
item.description: Currys has launched its Easter sale right now with discounts of up to 40% available across thousands of products, so I've searched the sale and hand-picked the 16 best deals on top-rated tech we love.

item.title: How a TechRadar investigation pushed Surfshark to overhaul its data collection
item.description: Surfshark has stopped logging your malware-related data. That's a major win for people's privacy — here's how TechRadar helped make it happen.

item.title: 'Sign of the times': Panasonic launches a USB-C version of its cheap wired earbuds, because who has a headphone jack any more?
item.description: Panasonic has unveiled the ErgoFit In-Ears are coming in a new USB-C form. Goodbye, 3.5mm.

item.title: MacBook Air M5 vs MacBook Air M4 — both are on sale right now, but which is the better buy?
item.description: It's a very difficult choice

item.title: Upgrade Your Home Office and earn an Exclusive Reward with Herman Miller
item.description: Get a free gift card of up to £30 when you spend over £500 at Herman Miller

item.title: Apple fans declare the ‘end of an era’ as the Mac Pro is discontinued — with its $700 accessory dubbed the ‘worst’ Apple product ever
item.description: Apple has discontinued the Mac Pro and its exorbitant wheel set, which TechRadar readers say is Apple’s worst-ever product.

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Can Microsoft fix Windows 11 by dumping AI?
item.description: It turns out people don't actually love having Copilot shoved into their faces. This week, Devindra and PCWorld Senior Editor Mark Hachman discuss Microsoft's surprising plan to "fix" Windows 11 by refocusing on customization and core features, instead of bringing Copilot AI into tons of apps. Is there any enthusiasm left for Windows? Or will most people be better off considering macOS or Linux?Subscribe!iTunesSpotifyPocket CastsStitcherGoogle PodcastsTopicMicrosoft hits the reset button on Windows 11, de-emphasizing Copilot AI – 1:03OpenAI pulls the plug on its Sora video generation app after...

item.title: 'There’s a huge new shift coming along': Coca-Cola and Walmart CEOs both say increasing AI usage behind them stepping down
item.description: Coca-Cola's CEO is stepping down because the company is facing "waves of organizational momentum" as AI takes hold.

item.title: Bonne nouvelle : malgré son prix en hausse, le nouveau Samsung Galaxy A57 (256 Go) baisse déjà de 100 € chez Boulanger
item.description: Nouvelle référence de chez Samsung, le Galaxy A57 devrait séduire les personnes à la recherche d'un smartphone solide sans se ruiner. D'ailleurs, sa version 256 Go devient bien plus intéressante chez Boulanger grâce à 50 euros de remise immédiate et un bonus de reprise.

item.title: Sony is raising PS5 prices by $100 in April
item.description: Sony is raising the price of its PlayStation 5 consoles globally starting April 2nd. In an announcement on Friday, Sony says that the standard PS5 will now cost $649.99, up from $549.99. Meanwhile, the PS5 Digital Edition now costs $599.99 instead of $499.99, and the PlayStation 5 Pro will cost $899.99 instead of $749.99. Along […]

item.title: The Morning After: Sony and Honda’s debut EV is dead before it even arrived
item.description: Honda and Sony announced that they are discontinuing both the Afeela 1 and 2, their electric cars. The company is reviewing its “business direction,” but it's hard to expect much from a car company that’s cancelled all of its cars. The Afeela 1, casually called the PlayStation Car, was meant to be a fusion of a modern EV and your own digital media bubble. (You could have a God of War-themed dash — if you wanted that.) Engadget There’s a wider pressure on Honda, beyond this risky collaboration with Sony. It expects to take a $15.7 billion loss after writing off a large portion of its EV investm...

item.title: How to watch Peacock from anywhere
item.description: NBC's streaming service is only available in the US – unless you use this clever trick. See how to watch Peacock from anywhere on Earth using a VPN.

item.title: 13 Best MagSafe Wallets (2026), Tested IRL
item.description: These convenient and slim magnetic wallets are the ones you’ll want to stick to the back of your smartphone.

item.title: Now the Oscars Aren’t Just Moving to YouTube, They’re Moving Out of Hollywood
item.description: In 2029, the prestigious awards are moving from the Dolby Theater in Hollywood to downtown Los Angeles.

item.title: Fender Mix review: Well-designed headphones that just fall short of greatness
item.description: I know what you’re thinking: “Isn’t Fender a guitar company?” It sure is, and has been one of the most iconic names in guitars and amplifiers since 1946. So what is the company doing making headphones and speakers? Well, it isn’t, exactly. Like Zound Industries used to do with Marshall (before buying the amp business), another company is licensing the Fender name for its consumer audio products. Fender Audio, the brand that’s on the headphones I’m reviewing, is owned by the Fender Corporation, but Riffsound oversees the design and production of portable audio gear. The first products from Fe...

item.title: MLB The Show 26 is turning me into more of a baseball fan
item.description: There were two questions I was looking to answer as I fired up MLB The Show 26. First, how much does the game cater to a baseball newbie like me? Second, will it keep me hooked enough to keep playing after my first few games?I think it's important to share some personal context. I have very limited experience with baseball. I have been to one MLB game, which was on my first visit to Canada as a teen. The lead-off Toronto Blue Jays hitter scored a home run on his first at-bat. Fireworks went off and everyone was going wild. Fun! But that was the only score of the whole game. My dad and I (both ...

item.title: Now's a great time to upgrade your gaming mouse — these 3 Razer models have been tried and tested, and get the TechRadar stamp of approval
item.description: A brilliant budget pick, a marvelous mid-range mouse, and a stellar splurge option.

item.title: 3 ways to take the ‘work’ out of networking
item.description: Make it easy for contacts to help. You’ve spent years building a robust professional network. You’ve cultivated relationships with peers, mentors, and industry leaders. So when you signal that you’re exploring new opportunities, you expect your network to perform. Yet too often, promising conversations dissolve into silence. Warm introductions never materialize. Emails go unanswered....

item.title: My apartment is always sparkling clean, and I owe it all to these two robots
item.description: This robot vacuum and window cleaner duo are specially designed for small spaces, and will drastically reduce the amount of time you spend scrubbing.

item.title: This brand secretly makes some of the best controllers around — and this one might be my favorite
item.description: RAM crisis got you spooked? Spend that money on one of the best controllers instead.

item.title: The mobile app traffic your security team can't see — and AI agents are generating it
item.description: AI agents don't knock before entering. Most of the security team doesn't know they're there.

item.title: RGG's Stranger Than Heaven game will span five time periods
item.description: Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio has revealed more details about its upcoming title, Stranger Than Heaven, at the Xbox Partner Preview stream. While previous teasers showed that it was going to be set in the 1910s and 1940s, it turns out its gameplay will span five different time periods: 1915, 1929, 1943, 1951 and 1965. The game’s events will also take place in five different cities. Ryu Ga Gotoku has yet to reveal what the locations will be based on, but the setting for 1965 seems to be Kamurocho. That’s the fictionalized version of Tokyo’s Kabukicho entertainment district in the studio’s games, the Yak...

item.title: One of my favorite games of 2025 is finally coming to Xbox this summer — Dispatch
item.description: AdHoc Studios has announced that its superhero workplace comedy, Dispatch, is officially coming to Xbox this summer.

item.title: Noodles & Company closed dozens of restaurants last year. Here’s why is the stock price soaring in 2026
item.description: The fast-casual chain has been optimizing its store footprint. This week, it said restaurant closures have boosted sales at nearby locations. As part of a strategic move to optimize its store footprint, Noodles & Company closed 33 company-owned restaurants in 2025. In January, the chain said it would close dozens more stores this year.

item.title: Hades 2, one of our top games of 2025, finally launches on PS5 and Xbox in April with new 'bonus content and quality-of-life improvements'
item.description: Supergiant Games has announced that its award-winning roguelike, Hades 2, will finally launch on PlayStation and Xbox next month.

item.title: Is this a whole new Microsoft? The fix Windows 11 campaign is already in high gear, and I'm loving that execs are seriously engaging with users
item.description: The big drive to fix Windows 11 is underway with regular, frank communication from execs — and it's clear that the taskbar is a top priority.

item.title: Android 17 va libérer toute la puissance de l’appareil photo de votre smartphone
item.description: Google a déployé la troisième bêta d'Android 17. Parmi les nouveautés, il y en a une qui est franchement intéressante : la possibilité d'utiliser toutes les fonctions de l'appareil photo dans les applications tierces.

item.title: This 4TB WD_Black SN7100 NVMe SSD deal is so good I had to check twice to make sure my eyes weren't playing tricks on me
item.description: Save $754 off the WD_Black SN7100 4TB NVMe SSD, a fast PCIe Gen4 drive that delivers read speeds up to 7,000MB/s and write speeds up to 6,700MB/s.

item.title: GAC choisit l’Autriche pour assembler l’Aion UT électrique, sa rivale de la Mégane E-Tech
item.description: Le constructeur chinois GAC arrive fort en Europe. Sa compacte électrique concurrente de la Renault Mégane E-Tech sera produite en Europe. De quoi réduire son prix, qui s'annonce particulièrement intéressant.

item.title: Five signs your infrastructure is stalling your AI strategy
item.description: Is your infrastructure stalling your AI strategy? Here are five critical signs.

item.title: Best External Hard Drive (2026): SSD to Store Data, Video, and More
item.description: Need an ultrafast drive for video editing or a rugged option to back up your photos in the field? We’ve got a solution for every situation.

item.title: What is the macOS Finder on your new MacBook Neo? Here’s your complete beginner’s guide on the Mac’s file organizer
item.description: Learn how to use the macOS Finder, from its simplest controls to its most advanced tools.

item.title: With Sora’s death, AI’s age of frivolity may be ending
item.description: I’m not embarrassed to admit I liked OpenAI’s synthetic video social network. But I understand why it’s going bye-bye. Hello again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In. Before we get underway, a little self-promotion: Apple’s 50th anniversary is on April 1. As the big day approached, I realized that many people present at the company’s creation were still very much with us. So I interviewed 23 of them for an oral history, “How Apple Became Apple: The Definitive Oral History of its Earliest Years.” It’s chock-full of great tales as told by everyone from cofounder Steve Wozniak to Liza...

item.title: TikTok for Business accounts targeted in phishing campaign — here's how to stay safe
item.description: TikTok for Business users warned not to click any shady links, especially those recently registered through Nicenic.

item.title: Les développeurs de Pragmata copient l’IA pour créer des décors plus faux que nature
item.description: L’intelligence artificielle générative est connue pour ses distorsions de la réalité. Une singularité technologique qui a inspiré les développeurs du prochain titre inédit de Capcom.
